summary: Recording is incomplete and out of order, but features an exceptional “Cold Rain and Snow” with great Garcia wah‑wah.
review: Both reviewers note serious issues with the release – it’s missing parts and tracks are out of sequence – which makes the recording frustrating to listen to.  The only musical praise centers on a haunting rendition of Cold Rain and Snow, highlighted for Jerry Garcia’s expressive wah‑wah guitar work.

ai_rating.rationale: Only two brief reviews; one is strongly negative about completeness, the other praises a single song. Combined show and recording quality are below average.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers complain that the tape is incomplete and out of order; no specific comments on clarity or mix, but the missing material limits listenability.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Noted as incomplete and tracks out of sequence, making set flow unclear.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Great wah‑wah playing on Cold Rain and Snow
